attempted_route: deepchem.models.CGCNNModel(mode='regression', n_tasks=1, batch_size=32, learning_rate=0.001).fit(NumpyDataset, nb_epoch=50) then .predict(test_dataset) + numpy.savetxt
observation: ImportError: 'This class requires DGL to be installed.' raised at CGCNNModel.__init__ in cgcnn.py line 185; script crashed in 4.3s before any training
rationale: deepchem.models.CGCNNModel internally requires the dgl (Deep Graph Library) package as a hard dependency, but dgl is absent from the venv. The method is otherwise correct for the task; the environment simply lacks the required backend.
recommended_alternative: Install dgl first (pip install dgl -f https://data.dgl.ai/wheels/repo.html) then retry the same deepchem.models.CGCNNModel(mode='regression', n_tasks=1) route; or switch to deepchem.models.AttentiveFPModel or deepchem.models.MPNNModel which use torch-geometric instead of dgl.
